"Move over Hollywood, the Lanes have arrived. Keeping Up With The Lanes is an unfiltered, unscripted reality show  into the life of Blossom Lane, the 12-year-old CEO and music prodigy taking over the industry.

This isn't a cartoon—this is real life. Cameras follow Blossom, her sister Chance, and her creative partner Stormi as they build a multi-million dollar empire from their glass-walled penthouse. From the tension of recording the 'Manual Magic' vocals to the high-stakes pressure of launching a global brand, see what it really takes to be the youngest boss in the game. In a world of scripts, Blossom Lane is writing her own rules. Can you keep up?"

metas.name: Decoding History's Prophecies
metas.description: Throughout history, tales of legendary figures have emerged with remarkable powers to see beyond the veil of time. From ancient China, Egypt and Rome to medieval Europe and the 20th-century United States, join historians, scholars and literati on a deep dive into the esoteric world of healers, hoaxers, mystics and oracles.

metas.name: That’s So Dee
metas.description: Dee Carter is a twelve-year-old powerhouse juggling a global business empire, a burgeoning music career, and the hilarious chaos of life in a mansion with her two superstar sisters. While she’s the CEO of the boardroom, navigating middle school and her "Visionary" siblings proves to be her biggest challenge yet. With a sharp wit and a "Mogul" mindset, she proves that age is just a number when you’re building a dynasty. That’s just how Dee does it!

metas.name: A Woman of Substance
metas.description: The life of Emma Harte, from kitchen maid at the beginning of the 20th-century, to respected businesswoman and grandmother in the 1980s. From humble beginnings, Emma Harte starts her business with a small shop, but over the next twenty years, she expands her stores and invests in the growing textile industry in Leeds.

metas.name: Age of Attraction
metas.description: Age is thrown out the window when singles search for their soulmates. Is love truly ageless, or will the years come between them?

metas.name: Scarpetta
metas.description: Renowned forensic pathologist Dr. Kay Scarpetta returns to her position as Virginia's Chief Medical Examiner, where she investigates a haunting murder with eerie reminders from her first big case decades ago. In 1998, Scarpetta works alongside Detective Pete Marino and FBI Agent Benton Wesley as they investigate a series of brutal stranglings. Based on the best-selling novels by Patricia Cornwell.

metas.name: Fukushima: A Nuclear Nightmare
metas.description: The definitive account of Japan’s struggle as it faced a nuclear catastrophe while still reeling from the devastation of an earthquake and tsunami.

metas.name: The Price is Right Tonight
metas.description: The All-New Canadian Edition, The Price is Right Tonight, Hosted by Howie Mandel

metas.name: Reminders of Him
metas.description: When Diem's custodial grandparents adamantly refuse Kenna's attempts to see her daughter, Kenna discovers unexpected compassion, and then something truer and deeper, with former NFL player and local bar owner Ledger. As their secret romance develops, so do the dangers for both of them, leading Kenna toward heartbreak and, ultimately, the hope for a second chance.

metas.name: ABC National Forum
metas.description: David Speers moderates this new discussion program bringing together ordinary citizens, community leaders, experts and policymakers to discuss topical issues of national significance.

metas.name: Dom Chinea’s Cornish Workshop
metas.description: The Repair Shop's Dom Chinea, his wife Maria and their dog Wendy take on the adventure of a lifetime as they swap the commuter bustle of Kent for the wild beauty of West Cornwall.

metas.name: I Can Grow It
metas.description: Step into the I Can Grow It city garden with Aaron and his team of helpful buds to unearth magic, music and mud, while discovering what goes on all year round.

metas.name: Back in Business
metas.description: A new series spotlighting women entrepreneurs who rebuilt their businesses after the devastating 2025 Los Angeles wildfires.

metas.name: Great British Castle Rescue
metas.description: Follow presenter Rick Edwards as he ventures inside some of the UK’s most spectacular and endangered castles. From crumbling medieval towers to collapsing royal chambers, engineers and historians battle to stabilise these epic structures before they're lost forever.

metas.name: The Ultimate Baking Championship
metas.description: Follows 16 pastry chefs tested on their core techniques, from laminated dough and pâte à choux to chocolate work and sugar artistry. Only one pastry chef will be named the Ultimate Baking Champion and win the $50,000 grand prize.

metas.name: Harry Styles. One Night in Manchester.
metas.description: In a special one off concert in Manchester, recorded on the evening of March 6, Harry Styles played his new album, ‘Kiss All The Time. Disco, Occasionally.' for the very first time.

metas.name: In Bed with Paige Desorbo
metas.description: Coming to you straight from Paige's favorite place-the bed-Paige and her sleepover guest share an unfiltered catch-up full of behind-the-scenes stories, and plenty of tea. It's fun, candid, and exactly the kind of conversation you'd expect In Bed with Paige.

metas.name: Planes that changed history
metas.description: Dive into the 125 years of aviation to uncover how aircraft have reshaped our world. The series explores the engineering secrets behind its success, its humble origins, and what made these aircraft icons years after their initial success.

metas.name: Disaster: The Chernobyl Meltdown
metas.description: Featuring revealing interviews with survivors speaking publicly for the first time, alongside rare insight into the CIA and Soviet responses, this series exposes a web of secrecy, miscalculation, and human cost. Astonishing new footage from inside the nuclear exclusion zone reveals how this scarred landscape is once again under siege as war encroaches on one of the most dangerous places on Earth.

metas.name: Gone
metas.description: When a headmaster's wife goes missing, suspicion falls on him. Is he hiding something, or is there more to this case than meets the eye?

metas.name: Rooster
metas.description: On a college campus, an author navigates a complicated relationship with his daughter.

metas.name: The Wizard of the Kremlin
metas.description: Russia, early 1990s. Amid post-Soviet chaos, a brilliant young man, Vadim Baranov, charts his path. First an artist, then a reality TV producer, he becomes the spin doctor to a rising KGB agent: Vladimir Putin. At the heart of power, Baranov shapes the new Russia, blurring the boundaries between truth and lies, belief and manipulation. Only the magnetic Ksenia is beyond his control, tempting him away from this dangerous game. Years later, after retreating into silence and shrouded in mystery, Baranov finally opens up, revealing the dark secrets of the regime he helped build.

metas.name: KPop Demon Hunters Bonus Content
metas.description: For the fans... from the fans! This collection of "KPop Demon Hunters" fan-video moments rounds up must-see clips to watch again and again.

metas.name: More Deconstructing the Beatles
metas.description: More Deconstructing the Beatles, hosted by "Beatle-ologist" Scott Freiman, is an educational documentary series analyzing the Fab Four's music, recording techniques, and history. It explores specific albums and songs through studio outtakes, interviews, and deep musical analysis. Episodes cover topics like A Hard Day's Night, Penny Lane, and George Harrison's songwriting.

metas.name: Good Boy
metas.description: Tommy, a volatile 19-year-old, revels in drugs, parties and violence. After getting separated from his friends on a drunken bender, he is abducted by a shadowy figure. He wakes to find himself imprisoned in the basement of a remote Yorkshire house, inhabited by a very strange family. But what unfolds is not what he could possibly expect.

metas.name: Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man
metas.description: After his estranged son gets embroiled in a Nazi plot, self-exiled gangster Tommy Shelby must return to Birmingham to save his family — and his nation.

metas.name: Protector
metas.description: Former war hero Nikki's peaceful life is shattered when her daughter is kidnapped. Thrust into the criminal underworld while hunted by cops and military, she must fight to rescue her child.

metas.name: War Machine
metas.description: On one last grueling mission during Army Ranger training, a combat engineer must lead his unit in a fight against a giant otherworldly killing machine.

metas.name: Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man Podcast
metas.description: Creators, special guests and stars — including Cillian Murphy — unpack the "Peaky Blinders" saga in this official companion podcast for the new film.

metas.name: Friends Like These: The Murder of Skylar Neese
metas.description: Follows the investigation into the 2012 murder of West Virginia teen Skylar Neese, whose closest friends were implicated in her death, examining friendship and betrayal in the digital age.

metas.name: The Dinosaurs
metas.description: From the first dinosaurs to the last, this epic documentary series examines their 165 million years on Earth and the forces that shaped their evolution.

metas.name: The Bet House
metas.description: The Bet House, created by Executive Producer David McCovy, is a half hour reality TV series where contestants, all living in a mansion for 30 days together, do sports betting challenges for a chance to win $250, 000 in cash.

metas.name: Alter Egos
metas.description: Geek isn’t a bad word—it’s a badge of honor. Alter Egos is a 6-part docuseries following pro and rising cosplayers as they travel the globe, build community, and transform from everyday fans into extraordinary characters.

metas.name: Venom Files - Anatomy of a Snake Bite
Alexander Armstrong in India
metas.description: The presenter embarks on a journey to explore a country rich in both history and tradition.

metas.name: Da Crib
metas.description: Rising star Chyna Boss’s dream life unravels when her wild family moves in, forcing her to choose between fame, love, and family chaos.

metas.name: Predator Hunters
metas.description: Each episode follows three investigations from the first digital clue through undercover online conversations and coordinated law enforcement operations, culminating in dramatic takedowns and arrests. Featuring exclusive, never-before-seen chat logs, raw bodycam footage, and in-depth police interviews, the series reveals how predators operate and the relentless work required to stop them. A recognized expert in the field, Tony Godwin assists law enforcement agencies nationwide, leading to the removal of hundreds of predators from the streets and out of the shadows.

metas.name: Ladies of London: The New Reign
metas.description: A new wave of British blue bloods, ambitious American expats and glamorous international socialites light up London’s elite social scene. As tradition collides with the fast-paced globalized world, these power players redefine what it means to belong to high society in one of the most iconic cities in the world.

metas.name: Vladimir
metas.description: When an English professor becomes obsessed with a handsome new colleague, her already complicated marriage and career are thrown into total chaos.

metas.name: Dirty Rotten Scandals
metas.description: The behind the scenes story of Dr. Phil, America's Next Top Model, and The Price is Right

metas.name: The Hounds Of Asterisk
metas.description: When lonely remote worker Geoff Bream decides to ‘ethically’ source an exotic dog off of the internet, what follows is an unreasonable spiral from his most mundane anxieties into a dark and perplexing reckoning.

metas.name: Dirty Rotten Scandals
metas.description: Exposing the darker side of America's most beloved TV shows with untold stories from past participants and new original reporting.

metas.name: Hunt For The Missing: Chicago
metas.description: In the series, retired Chicago Detective Pamela Childs revisits unsolved missing persons cases as she hopes to uncover new leads and find potential answers for the victims’ families.

metas.name: Stripped Down
metas.description: Six strippers share one house for a week where real life gets harder to hide.

metas.name: Tonight at the Museum
metas.description: Filmed on location in a real museum after dark, surrounded by priceless artefacts, taxidermy and historical curiosities, Alex Lee guides four celebrity players through a series of challenges and quizzes.

metas.name: Hostage
metas.description: Set against the backdrop of the rise of the Islamic State Group comes this gripping documentary thriller that follows the fate of British photojournalist John Cantlie, kidnapped in Syria alongside his colleague and friend James Foley.

metas.name: Blue Therapy
metas.description: Seven couples move out of their comfort zones and onto the therapist's couch to try and work through their relationship issues in this reality series.

metas.name: Flavortown Food Fight
metas.description: Long referred to but never before seen, the mythical and delicious Flavortown will be the setting for this multi-round, culinary competition. In each episode, Fieri will welcome three chefs to Flavortown where skills and cooking chops can earn advantages and ultimately a win. Competitors will choose their own adventure as they compete in authentic food establishments ranging from street food carts to neighborhood spots to fast casual eateries and the finest fine dining restaurants in the world. The chefs must be quick on their feet as their culinary knowledge, technical skills, and overall cooking acumen are tested round after round. With restaurant names inspired by Guy's life, the series will deliver everything fans have ever dreamed Flavortown could be. The winner of each episode has a chance to score up to $20,000 in prize money and will return to defend their title against two new chefs the following week.

metas.name: America's Culinary Cup
metas.description: Top chefs compete in challenges testing creativity, endurance, presentation and leadership skills in America's Culinary Cup.

metas.name: Young Sherlock
metas.description: Sherlock Holmes is a disgraced young man, raw and unfiltered, when he finds himself wrapped up in a murder case that threatens his liberty. His first ever case unravels a globe-trotting conspiracy that changes his life forever.

metas.name: Battle of the Brands
metas.description: Two famous consumer brands, leading rivals in their field, go head-to-head for our money. Why do we love them so much? And who’s best?

metas.name: We the People 2026
metas.description: MS NOW's continuing coverage of the 2026 midterm elections.

metas.name: Our Farm - A GIY Story
metas.description: A six-part series follows the ambitious attempt to restore one of Ireland’s largest walled gardens and build a viable, community-scale food system from the ground up.

metas.name: Europe on the Edge with Katya Adler
metas.description: Katya Adler examines the political situation in Europe.

metas.name: R.J. Decker
metas.description: Ex-con photographer RJ Decker becomes a PI in South Florida, solving strange cases with help from his journalist ex, her cop wife, and an enigmatic woman from his past who may help or destroy him.

metas.name: Katie's Kuri
metas.description: This children's show explores the friendship between a lonely girl named Katie and her new puppy, given to her when she moves in with her uncle. Katie's confidence grows as she uses te reo Maori to train the pup at Whaea Kaz's dog training school.

metas.name: Mattimus Martin's Time Travel Informative Show Thing
metas.description: Join Mattimus Martin as he travels through time to talk about recent and relevant event in history through Satire!

metas.name: NWSL: The Final Third
metas.description: Angel City FC, Washington Spirit, and KC Current navigate an unpredictable NWSL season.

metas.name: Handcuffed: Last Pair Standing
metas.description: Jonathan Ross hosts this reality challenge in which nine pairs of strangers with different beliefs, lifestyles, opinions and habits are handcuffed together for as long as they can stand it. The pairs must navigate eating, dressing and even sleeping just inches apart as they are sent on a road trip across the UK - with the ones who last the longest in the running for £100,000. From a bar tender and a millionaire to an alpha male and a proud feminist, which couple will be the first to take the cuffs off?

metas.name: Wild Vacation Rentals
metas.description: Comedians and best friends D'Arcy Carden and Sherry Cola hit the road to discover the wildest vacation rentals across America.

metas.name: Bachelor Mansion Takeover
metas.description: In a high-stakes design competition, 12 Bachelor Nation alums return to renovate the iconic mansion. They must design, build and strategize their way to the top. Only one winner will walk away with a cash prize and the ultimate bragging rights.

metas.name: Ross Kemp: Lost Boys, Deadly Men
metas.description: Ross Kemp investigates the online communities of isolation, anger, and misogyny that are reshaping masculinity. Kemp explores whether Britain’s incels are responsible for the wave of violence against women, or if the roots of the problem lie far deeper and are more widespread than anyone dared think.

metas.name: Messy Lola
metas.description:
Lola is an expert at managing the mess—just not her own. She's a reluctant mother, a flighty romantic partner, and perpetually annoyed by her insufferable coworkers.

Her carefully controlled chaos is upended by the arrival of Kayla, a beacon of millennial optimism, who represents everything Lola is not. When Kayla moves in next door and then into her office, Lola's defenses are breached. Her unwavering kindness and success holds up a mirror, forcing Lola to ask a terrifying question: at what point do we stop blaming the world for our unhappiness and start untangling the mess we've made of ourselves?

metas.name: Goat Girl
metas.description: Gigi, a 13–year-old girl just happens to have been raised by mountain goats. But now that she's a teenager, her Nanny and Billy think it's time that Gigi spread her wings (her… horns?), so this year she will attend a boarding school and, for the first time in her life, spend time around actual people.

metas.name: Sportsing
metas.description:
Sportsing! is your all-access pass to sports, blending expert insights, real-life experiences, and humor. We cover everything from game highlights to the personal stories shaping athletes and the industry. Whether you're an aspiring athlete, a supportive parent, or just want to sound confident talking sports, we've got you. From trends and athlete interviews to training tips and behind-the-scenes moments, Sportsing! is the ultimate sports conversation starter.

Hosted by Gloria Govan (Basketball Wives, EDGE Hydration) and Erica Lynn O’Keith (Romeo!, Tabula Rasa), this podcast bridges sports, entertainment, and business. With their media and entrepreneurial experience, they bring fresh, compelling sports perspectives you won’t find anywhere else.

metas.name: Extreme Catch
metas.description: Extreme Catch is a new reality show premiering on March 1, 2026, on National Geographic. It follows Captain Bruce Davey and his family as they embark on a challenging fishing expedition in the dangerous waters of Cape Carnage, Northern Australia, aiming for a 45-ton catch goal.

metas.name: Seeking Persephone
metas.description: To save her family, Persephone marries a cold, distant duke - never expecting to awaken a love that could change them both forever.

metas.name: The KableOne Talks with Satinder Satti
metas.description: The KableOne Talks with Satinder Satti is a talk-show series featuring in-depth, candid conversations with Punjab's sports personalities and icons In its first episode, host Satinder Satti engages with guests to explore their personal journeys from humble beginnings and struggles to moments of triumph and recognition the show goes beyond achievements, touching on the challenges, setbacks, inspirations, and untold stories that have shaped these athletes careers and lives It's designed to offer viewers an emotional and motivational narrative of resilience, passion and success within the world of Punjabi sports.

metas.name: Absolute Hunderd
metas.description: Nineteen-year-old Sonja is a junior champion in shooting. Her mother lives abroad, and her father, a war veteran, has fallen so far into debt that he, Sonja, and her older brother may be forced out of their home. Her brother tries to solve the situation through shady dealings, but when he ends up witnessing a crime he becomes the target of a local thug. In order to protect her family, Sonja decides to take justice into her own hands. After a four-year hiatus, the festival has again included a miniseries in its program, this time in the form of a dynamic thriller with political undertones, directed by well-known filmmaker Srdan Golubović and three of his former students.

metas.name: Marshals
metas.description: With the Yellowstone Ranch behind him, Kayce Dutton joins an elite unit of U.S. Marshals, combining his skills as a cowboy and Navy SEAL to bring range justice to Montana, where he and his teammates must balance family, duty and the high psychological cost that comes with serving as the last line of defense in the region's war on violence.

metas.name: American Classic
metas.description: Exiled Broadway star Richard Bean returns to his family's small-town theater, igniting hope and chaos in his wake. As old loves resurface and buried secrets emerge Richard and the town are transformed by the power of making art.

metas.name: DTF St. Louis
metas.description: A love triangle among three adults experiencing middle-age malaise leads to one of them ending up dead.

metas.name: Lip-Reading the Royals: What Are They Really Saying?
metas.description: Experts reveal what the royals are saying when they think nobody is listening.

metas.name: Operation Taco Gary's
metas.description: Two brothers uncover an alien invasion hidden inside a fast-food chain and must save Earth.

metas.name: Starbright
metas.description: A young woman becomes the guardian of a fallen star, which she must protect from dangerous forces with the help of a brave stranger.

metas.name: Dangerous Games - A Chris Hansen Investigation
metas.description: Where are today's predators lurking? Many are on the very same platforms as your children, carefully grooming them and influencing them with everything from cybercash to threats. Chris Hansen digs deep with this hard-hitting investigation exploring various platforms, starting with Roblox.

metas.name: Astara: A Stromedy Adventure
metas.description: To rescue his brother, Kyle and his friends play the cursed Astara board game, unleashing real-world horrors they must defeat to survive.

metas.name: 中山美穂40周年－Thank You for the Memories－
metas.description: Talk and scene from the blu-ray box「NAKAYAMA MIHO 40th Anniversary Thank You for the Memories」

metas.name: Final Siren: Inside the AFL
metas.description: In one of the tightest seasons in AFL history, Final Siren follows seven of the game's biggest names - Marcus Bontempelli, Nat Fyfe, Max Gawn, Toby Greene, Touk Miller, Cam Rayner and Dayne Zorko - as public doubt, online abuse, injuries, ageing, suspensions, and fierce rivalries threaten to derail what could be their shot at Premiership glory in 2025.

metas.name: In The Test Kitchen
metas.description:
America's Test Kitchen's Lan Lam, Bryan Roof, Lidey Heuck and Nik

Sharma discuss the culture, stories and science behind the foods we

love to eat.

metas.name: The Official House of Villains Podcast
metas.description: Tyson Apostol invites fellow contestants to break down every episode of "House of Villains" with sharp analysis and behind-the-scenes insights.

metas.name: David: King of Israel
metas.description: Follows the biblical King David through his journey marked by courage, violence, passion, failure, and redemption.

metas.name: Get a Little Out There with Alex Honnold
metas.description: Free-spirited rock climber Alex Honnold road trips through Nevada in his van, discovering hidden gems, outdoor thrills, and local culture while showing viewers the transformative power of stepping outside their comfort zones.

metas.name: The Gray House
metas.description: The untold true story of four brave women who served as key espionage agents and turned the tide of the American Civil War in favor of the North, risking life and liberty to help win the war and preserve democracy. A Richmond Socialite and her daughter, a formerly enslaved African-American, and a courtesan build the first successful female spy ring.

metas.name: Bride of Charlie
metas.description: Follows an investigation into conspiracy theories about Erika Kirk, widow of assassinated Turning Point USA founder Charlie Kirk, examining her past and motivations.

metas.name: Adepta Sororitas: Penitence
metas.description: A group of Adepta Sororitas must overcome a physical and spiritual ordeal as they seek to deliver a sacred relic to its ordained resting place.

metas.name: Draw Your Weapons
metas.description: From Titmouse Animation Studios it's the show that flips the Actual Play format on its head with live drawing, real-time chaos, and confessional-style storytelling. Punk, DIY, and pure creative impulse fuel this high-energy love letter to doing things for the hell of it.

metas.name: Lost Women of Alaska
metas.description: The brutal murders of two Alaska Native women and the shocking investigation that led authorities to their sadistic killer

metas.name: The Greatest Average American
metas.description: "The Greatest Average American" is a hilarious new game show that celebrates the power of being perfectly average. Each round is packed with laugh-out-loud challenges and trivia as contestants try to guess how everyday Americans think and live. In the end, one lucky player will be crowned the Greatest Average American and get the chance to win the ultimate grand prize: the average American salary of $67,920.

metas.name: Scrubs
metas.description: J.D. & Turk scrub in together for the first time in a long time–medicine has changed, interns have changed, but their bromance has stood the test of time. Characters new and old navigate the waters of Sacred Heart with laughter, heart and some surprises along the way.

metas.name: Hoppers
metas.description: Scientists have discovered how to 'hop' human consciousness into lifelike robotic animals, allowing people to communicate with animals as animals. Animal lover Mabel seizes an opportunity to use the technology, uncovering mysteries within the animal world beyond anything she could have imagined.

metas.name: Taylor Tomlinson: Prodigal Daughter
metas.description: Taylor Tomlinson takes her fans to church with hilarious confessions about dating in her 30s, her dream assistant and why she refuses to use AI.

metas.name: Ice Skater
metas.description: A survival drama about an ice skater stranded on an ice floe at the Arctic Sea. When the ice floe starts to float towards south and melt, the ice skater must use all means necessary to survive.

metas.name: Britain's X-Files
metas.description: Deep beneath the streets of London sit thousands of highly classified and previously top-secret government files which disclose the details of extensive military, spy agency and police investigations into the paranormal. With hundreds of hours dedicated to examining these formerly off-limits documents from the National Archives, investigative journalist Tim Tate reveals just how far authorities on both sides of the Atlantic were willing to go to venture into the unknown. Combining his findings with expert insight from Dr David Clarke, Britain’s X-Files fact-checks out-of-this-world phenomena with cases including the legend of the Flying Dutchman, Harry Grindell Matthews and his Death Ray, the Beast of Bodmin, Uri Geller, the Comet plane catastrophes, premonitions on the Aberfan disaster and more.

metas.name: Todd Sampson's Why?
metas.description: Todd Sampson explores the intriguing complexities of human behaviour, driven by a curiosity to unravel the mysteries behind our actions. Each episode embarks on a quest to understand the things people do.

metas.name: Australia's Greatest Conman?
metas.description: In the 1980s, John Friedrich led an elite sea and land rescue squad out of Victoria, winning an Order of Australia, top-secret government contracts and hundreds of millions of dollars in loans. But no one knew that John Friedrich was not who he made out to be, and his undoing revealed one of the most audacious scams in Australian history, an estimated $900 million in today’s value.

metas.name: The Heat
metas.description: Work hard, play harder? Olivia Attwood throws 10 ambitious young chefs into Jean-Christophe Novelli’s Barcelona kitchen, where things continue to heat up long after service stops.

metas.name: The Heat
metas.description: Work hard, play harder? Olivia Attwood throws 10 ambitious young chefs into Jean-Christophe Novelli’s Barcelona kitchen, where things continue to heat up long after service stops.

metas.name: The Dyers' Caravan Park
metas.description: Danny Dyer and daughter Dani try their hand at investing in and running a holiday caravan park in the UK. With childhood nostalgia in his heart and business ambition in his sights, Danny and Dani are diving headfirst into the £7 billion holiday park industry. They’ll stop at nothing in their quest to transform a caravan park into a place that lives up to Danny’s misty-eyed memories of the best holidays he’s ever had in his life.

metas.name: Displaced
metas.description: A depressed, dysfunctional physicist accidentally sent back in time tries to fix her future by mentoring her troubled 14-year-old self: a whole-ass handful with her own mischievous agenda.

metas.name: South West High
metas.description: In a struggling inner-city high school, former professional basketball player turned family man Nolan Thomas returns to his alma mater as principal. As Nolan pushes for reform, he must confront painful truths about power, accountability and sacrifice, realizing that saving a school may require risking everything he holds dear.

metas.name: Police Interceptors: Taking Down the Shoplifting Gangs
metas.description: Officers tackle the thieves terrorising supermarkets and shops, with organised international crime groups stealing eye-watering amounts in increasingly industrial, brazen and sophisticated ways.

metas.name: Do You Know Your Place?
metas.description: Quiz show hosted by Vernon Kay. Traitors star Paul Gorton tours a different UK destination each day as celebrities battle it out across the week to prove who knows the most.

metas.name: The CEO Club
metas.description: Dive deep into the world of seven trailblazing female CEOs (Serena Williams, Thalia, Dee Ocleppo Hilfiger, Loren Ridinger, Winnie Harlow, Hannah Bronfman, and Isabela Rangel Grutman) as they navigate the triumphs and challenges of both their professional and personal lives. Redefining what it means to lead in today's world, these women enter the next phase of their careers with confidence and clarity forged by life experiences.

metas.name: AI Confidential with Hannah Fry
metas.description: Hannah Fry takes a deep dive into some of the most extraordinary human stories emerging from the world of AI, from falling in love with a chatbot to life and death decisions made by robots.

metas.name: CIA
metas.description: When by-the-book FBI Special Agent Bill Goodman is loaned out to a clandestine CIA/FBI task force, he finds himself teamed up with secretive and roguish CIA case officer Colin Glass. Together they work covert operations in New York, uncovering international plots, terrorist cells, and geopolitical secrets.

metas.name: Dirty Business
metas.description: Two amateur detectives in an Oxfordshire village discover dying fish in their river. When they contact the water company for answers, the company's odd, evasive response prompts them to launch an investigation that continues today.

metas.name: Chasing a Killer: Gary Allen
metas.description: When Gary Allen is acquitted of murdering Samantha Class in 2000, detectives know it's only a matter of time before he strikes again. In 2019, the murder of another woman, Alena Grlakova, leads detectives once again to Gary Allen, unearthing chilling evidence which changes the course of the investigation and entwines Alena and Samantha's cases forever. Can he finally be brought to Justice?

metas.name: History's Greatest Picks with Mike Wolfe
metas.description: With an eye for the unique and a passion for historic collectibles, Mike guides viewers through surprising new details about bizarre artifacts and rare collectibles. Bringing history to life one pick at time, the series reveals the secrets and significance of elusive finds, while telling the incredible backstories.

metas.name: The Lady
metas.description: Jane Andrews' life changes overnight when she lands a dream job in Buckingham Palace and bonds with the Duchess of York.

metas.name: The Imperial Palace
metas.description: The Imperial Palace of Japan showcases peerless artworks, craftsmanship, and a tradition of thoughtful hospitality - join us on a journey into a world of supreme aesthetic elegance.

metas.name: Orange County Choppers Original
metas.description: Orange County Choppers Original brings the legendary shop back to its roots -- real bikes, real stories, and the raw, unfiltered energy that made OCC a household name.

metas.name: One Mile: Chapter Two
metas.description: Former special forces operative Danny is forced back onto a remote island when a violent, secretive community takes revenge by abducting his daughter Alex, launching a relentless hunt against enemies prepared for his every move.

metas.name: One Mile: Chapter One
metas.description: After being released from prison, a father tries to reconnect with his daughter by taking her on a tour of college, but they soon find themselves fighting for more than their lost relationship when a murderous cult pursues them.

metas.name: Midwinter Break
metas.description: Longtime retired couple Stella and Gerry realise that their relationship has reached a crossroads while on holiday in Amsterdam. After so much time and so many memories, long-held promises and deeply concealed wounds threaten to come to light and force them to confront their future.

metas.name: Famous Last Words: Eric Dane
metas.description: In this emotional interview, the late actor and ALS advocate Eric Dane shared his final message for the world — knowing it would not air until his death.

metas.name: I Can Only Imagine 2
metas.description: Following the breakout success of the song 'I Can Only Imagine', MercyMe's Bart Millard is living the dream—sold-out arenas, a devoted fanbase, and a thriving career. But behind the spotlight, Bart's past threatens the family he's built, especially the fragile bond with his son Sam. When hopeful newcomer Tim Timmons joins the band for their biggest tour yet, he unknowingly brings a renewed gratitude to Bart's life through their unlikely friendship. Bart soon discovers that Tim carries hardships—and secrets—of his own, forcing him to face his past and repair his relationships with Sam and his wife Shannon before fame costs him what matters most.

metas.name: عدم المؤاخذة
metas.description: Eadam Almuaakhadha

metas.name: Walkers Unpacked: Inside The Crisp Factory
metas.description: Behind the scenes documentary at the Walkers factory as the company launches a crisp flavour and its new logo and packaging design.

metas.name: Unlikely Hero Group
metas.description: "A nobody with the strength of a warrior."

metas.name: Strip Law
metas.description: An uptight lawyer teams with a flashy Las Vegas magician to bring some pizzazz to the city's stupidest cases in this adult animated comedy.

metas.name: Descendants/ZOMBIES Worlds Collide - Concert Special
metas.description: Celebrating the high-energy music from the iconic Descendants and ZOMBIES franchises, the Descendants/ZOMBIES Worlds Collide Tour thrilled sold-out crowds in over 40 arenas across North America last summer. Now, families and fans of all ages can relive the excitement - singing and dancing along with their favorite stars from the comfort of home.

metas.name: گەوهەر و خوشکەکانی
metas.description:
Gawhar and her sisters is a social drama about three sisters who have a sick mother and will be broadcast on Ava Media during the holy month of Ramadan.

Main Story: The drama Gawar and her sisters is broadcast on Ava during the month of Ramadan.

metas.name: Sukha Raider
metas.description: Sukha Raider is today's story of Punjab, where Kabaddi becomes a front for drugs and corruption. Based on incidents, the series highlights the harsh truth behind the exploitation of Punjab's youth.

metas.name: O Messenger
metas.description: "O Messenger" is the world’s first AI-Visualized Sirah series, it represents the life of the Prophet Muhammad peace be upon him and his journey to prophethood.

metas.name: Dekh Idhar Aik Nazar
metas.description: "Dekh Idhar Aik Nazar" is a lighthearted romantic comedy that takes place in the lively neighborhood of Chand Nagar. This bustling area serves as the perfect backdrop for a series of humorous and heartwarming encounters between two unlikely individuals. Amidst the vibrant streets and quirky locales, the film explores themes of love, friendship, and the unpredictable nature of fate. With its charming setting and colorful cast of characters, "Chand Nagar " promises to be an entertaining and uplifting cinematic experience for audiences of all ages.

metas.name: Hunting Outback Gold
metas.description: Two life-long friends, Jeff and Brendan, lead a daring expedition deep into the Australian Outback, to find a legendary fortune in gold and solve a 100-year-old mystery.

metas.name: Backstage Japan
metas.description: Go behind the scenes at Japan's most popular and intriguing places. Discover world-class expertise and advanced technology, driven by imagination, dedication, and attention to detail.

metas.name: Murder in Glitterball City
metas.description: The city of Louisville, Kentucky, known for its historic Victorian architecture and birthplace of the mirrored glitterball, proves to be an unlikely backdrop for a dark tale of murder. This documentary explores the shifting landscape of a mysterious killing, a toxic relationship, a vulnerable victim and the unreliable accounts of two ex-lovers on trial for their lives.

metas.name: Girl on the Run: The Hunt for America's Most Wanted Woman
metas.description: When convicted double murderer Sarah Pender escapes from a maximum-security prison in Indiana, a nationwide manhunt is immediately launched. Charged alongside her former boyfriend, who pled guilty, for the murder of a young couple, Pender has vanished, igniting fear, fascination, and a relentless pursuit that stretches across state lines.

metas.name: Ed Stafford's Rite of Passage
metas.description: From 24 hours of agony in Brazil to jumping over bulls in Ethiopia, adventurer Ed Stafford courses the world to experience how indigenous peoples turn boys into men.

metas.name: Blue Skies
metas.description: National Park Investigator Jodi Larsen and a lost dog named Blue team up to solve mysteries in the wilderness, forging an unexpected bond amidst danger and healing.

metas.name: Taste of Art
metas.description: Taste of Art is a bold new culinary reality competition where ten of Aotearoa’s most talented chefs go head-to-head in a high-stakes battle of creativity and skill. Over seven gripping episodes, the chefs are challenged to push the boundaries of food as art, crafting unexpected, visually stunning, and deeply personal dishes under pressure.

metas.name: First Timers on the Frontline
metas.description: First Timers on the Frontline follows student, intern and newly qualified paramedics as they face real emergencies. The series offers a close look at a new generation of paramedics learning on the job with support from advanced paramedics and senior members of the National Ambulance Service.

metas.name: Adiabin
metas.description: After the Ottoman Empire's collapse, Mumtaz Pasha, a Kurdish patriot, clashes with Bahjat Pasha, an Ottoman loyalist. In a shifting landscape, their destinies entwine, unveiling a web of loyalties and betrayals in the evolving Middle East.

metas.name: Swindlers
metas.description: The true stories of some of Ireland’s most renowned con-artists through the voices of the victims they scammed and the law enforcers who brought them to justice

metas.name: Day Pass
metas.description: Armed with a day pass and love of public transit, Jason explores a new city while riding as much public transit as possible.

metas.name: Alice Roberts: Our Hospital Through Time
metas.description: Unprecedented access to the renowned hospital's modern wards and private archive.

metas.name: The Surgeon
metas.description: We look behind the surgeon's mask - from the pressured operating theatre to life at home.

metas.name: MAFS: After The Dinner Party
metas.description:
Get ready, Australia! The nation's biggest obsession just got a whole lot juicier. The Married At First Sight universe is expanding like never before with the launch of MAFS: After The Dinner Party, your first and only place to dive into exclusive, unfiltered interviews with the participants right after the show's iconic dinner parties. Plus, fans will have the chance to see unseen footage that picks up right where the main show leaves off, offering even more drama and insight.

With Jules Lund, Brittany Hockley, and Laura Byrne steering the conversation, the debrief starts the second the dinner party ends. MAFS: After The Dinner Party is the ultimate companion series, offering an unapologetic look at the season's biggest scandals. Whether it’s the 'red flags' or catching a first glimpse of the wreckage, this is the essential, no-holds-barred breakdown where the tea is spilt, and the real truth is revealed.

metas.name: Wild Boys: Strangers in Town
metas.description: In 2003, two young men emerge from the forests of British Columbia claiming to have been raised entirely off the grid. As a small town tries to help them, a mystery unfolds, testing how far people will go to believe the unbelievable.

metas.name: Being Gordon Ramsay
metas.description: Follow Gordon Ramsay over 9 months in the lead up to his biggest restaurant venture to date: the opening of 5 culinary experiences in London's 22 Bishopsgate, the City of London's tallest building.

metas.name: 56 Days
metas.description: When an unidentified body is found in a luxury apartment linked to Oliver Kennedy and his girlfriend Ciara Wyse, Detectives Lee Reardon and Karl Connolly reconstruct the couple's deadly romance across the past 56 days.

metas.name: The Bluff
metas.description: When her tranquil life on a remote island is shattered by the return of her vengeful former captain, a skilled ex-pirate must confront her bloody past and unleash her deadly talents to save her family from a ruthless siege.

metas.name: Hellfire
metas.description: A drifter with a mysterious past arrives in a small town and finds the residents in the grip of a ruthless crime boss and realizes he has to help them.

metas.name: Bhole Ki Bhool
metas.description: In a contrasting tale, Pujari's greed leads to chaos while Iyer's humility and kindness foster genuine fulfillment, highlighting the dangers of ambition versus selflessness.

metas.name: Las 3.000 Celebrate Life
metas.description: This documentary shows the history of Manuel, gypsy gay man, as well as his neighborhoods story.

metas.name: The Tony Blair Story
metas.description:
Tony Blair is one of Britain's most successful and controversial leaders. With unprecedented access, including Blair and family, this series charts his meteoric rise to power. And what happened next.

Featuring an in-depth interview with Tony Blair himself, his story is also told through those who knew him best – friends, allies, and opponents. Peeling back the layers of political spin and tabloid sensationalism, the programme offers a fresh perspective on the man who transformed the Labour Party and reshaped Britain.

The series goes beyond the headlines to explore the key moments that shaped Blair’s leadership, providing a gripping insight into one of the most influential Prime Ministers of the modern era.

metas.name: Fukushima: Days That Shocked the World
metas.description: Survivors and witnesses recall March 11 2011 - when Japan was hit by a devastating tsunami of 40-foot waves, killing 20,000 and triggering a nuclear meltdown.

metas.name: Paradise: Official Podcast
metas.description: Paradise actor, superfan and family member Ryan Michelle Bathé talks to the cast and crew that brought the spellbinding second season to life, from the show's biggest stars, like her husband Sterling K. Brown, to creator Dan Fogelman, and beyond.

metas.name: Trevor's Tapes
metas.description: A young man named Trevor Dobson finds his recently departed grandfather's VHS tapes that have his name written on them, he finds something very disturbing.

metas.name: Skegness Psycho: 28 Miles to Murder
metas.description: A violent offender walks 28 miles to murder his ex-partner after sending abusive messages. Through family testimony and expert insight, this powerful documentary exposes missed warnings and systemic failures.

metas.name: Reality Check: Inside America's Next Top Model
metas.description: What started as a glamorous launchpad for aspiring models became a pop-culture juggernaut defined by explosive drama, public meltdowns, and controversies that still fuel viral moments today.

metas.name: The Disappointments
metas.description: Three gay men navigate middle age, its trials and triumphs. After the death of a close friend, they must support each other as they examine the idea that maybe things didn't work out exactly as planned.

metas.name: How to Make a Killing
metas.description: Disowned at birth by his obscenely wealthy family, blue-collar Becket Redfellow will stop at nothing to reclaim his inheritance, no matter how many relatives stand in his way.

metas.name: Because of Cupid
metas.description: Best friends Naomi and Marcus participate in a Valentine's Day mocktail competition but things go awry when Cupid interferes with a love potion that affects Marcus and several of their friends.

metas.name: Shadow Protocol
metas.description: After a mysterious tape from their past raises more questions than answers, two friends begin to suspect that something isn’t right. What starts as confusion quickly turns into danger as they realize they may be connected to something far bigger—and far more deadly—than they ever imagined.

metas.name: Fatal Conflicts - The Rise and Fall of Civilisations
metas.description: Documentary series on ZDF and ARTE.

metas.name: No Holds Barred: The GWS Giants
metas.description: An eight-part docuseries offering unprecedented access to the inner sanctum of the GIANTS throughout their 2025 AFL and AFLW seasons.

metas.name: Adam Loves Adventure
metas.description: Adam and the Shelby crew zoom into sci-fi adventures, meeting strange aliens, exploring new worlds, learning science, and solving problems with empathy, teamwork, and friendship!

metas.name: Locker Diaries: ZOMBIES
metas.description: Glimpse the drama happening in the school hallways of Shadyside & Sunnyside and discover the secret adventures that unfold.

metas.name: Kissing Is the Easy Part
metas.description: Sean's gunning for MIT. Flora's ditching the SAT. A secret deal with her tenured parents sparks a romance that challenges everything they believe in.

metas.name: Joe's College Road Trip
metas.description: To teach his sheltered grandson about the real world, Madea's foul-mouthed brother Joe takes the college-bound teen on a raucous cross-country road trip.

metas.name: Crime 101
metas.description: When an elusive thief whose high-stakes heists unfold along the iconic 101 freeway in Los Angeles eyes the score of a lifetime, with hopes of this being his final job, his path collides with a disillusioned insurance broker who is facing her own crossroads. Determined to crack the case, a relentless detective closes in on the operation, raising the stakes even higher.

metas.name: Head to Head
metas.description:
Follows a group of tennis players gathered at an upscale club for training and competition. On the court, they face off in matches driven by ambition and rivalry; off the court, tension builds through attraction, ego clashes, and shifting dynamics.

Two of the main players start as direct competitors, each trying to outshine the other. As they spend more time together, their rivalry gradually blends with a strong mutual attraction. Meanwhile, other players become involved, creating a fluid environment where alliances and interests constantly evolve.

Using the sport as a backdrop, the story explores intense connections between the characters, balancing moments of competition with more personal encounters, and maintaining a “head-to-head” tension both physically and emotionally throughout.

metas.name: Production History
metas.description: The making of both classic and cult movies, exploring their development, production challenges, and lasting legacy.

metas.name: Thai Street Food: Best Kept Secrets
metas.description: Explore Thailand's vibrant street food and discover its best kept secrets; revealing cultural traditions, surprising spiritual roots and hidden culinary legacies. Guided by renowned street food vlogger Mark Wiens and featuring Thai culinary experts, Thai Street Food: Best Kept Secrets highlights the personal stories of street vendors, generational cooks, and community leaders who keep street food traditions alive. From Bangkok's ancient breakfast customs to the spiritual practices of the Phuket Jay Festival, each episode delves into the connections between food, culture, and identity. This six-part docuseries offers a fresh perspective on the country's food heritage and uncovers dishes rooted in history, spirituality, and sustainability.

metas.name: ART SHOW! WITH CAPTAIN SKINNER
metas.description: Underground artist Skinner has been taken hostage in outer space. The alien overlords have forced him to make an art show that blends art, performance, and controlled chaos — created under pressure, surveillance, and strange cosmic rules.

metas.name: Girl Failure
metas.description: A trio of twenty-something roommates (and an ex-boyfriend) navigate heartbreak, friendship, and messy mistakes together.

metas.name: Duck & Frog
metas.description: Duck is just trying to make rent and is always accepting new jobs, but his dreams of keeping a job for longer than a day inevitably crumble before him thanks to overbearing Frog.

metas.name: Neighbors
metas.description: Examines stories of absurd, outrageous, and dramatic real-life residential conflicts from a wide range of larger-than-life characters across the United States, opening a verité portal into the lives of contemporary American.

metas.name: Jesy Nelson: Life After Little Mix
metas.description: Exclusive and intimate documentary following Jesy Nelson as she becomes a mother for the first time, while reflecting on the years which made her famous in Little Mix. Raw, tender and empowering, it captures her emotional journey - from the joys and heartbreaks of a troubled pregnancy to redefining her identity beyond fame. For the first time, Jesy reveals the truth behind her split from the band.

metas.name: Love Me Love Me
metas.description: After her brother's death, June moves to Milan for a fresh start, finding comfort in Will, the perfect honor student at her new international school. But when his troubled best friend James—hiding a dangerous life in clandestine MMA fights—sparks a rivalry that quickly turns into irresistible attraction, June must choose between safety and a love that upends everything she thought she wanted.

metas.name: Love Story: John F. Kennedy Jr. & Carolyn Bessette Official Podcast
metas.description: Join host Evan Ross Katz on FX’s Love Story: John F. Kennedy Jr. & Carolyn Bessette Official Podcast featuring Sarah Pidgeon, Paul Anthony Kelly, Grace Gummer and Naomi Watts with Creator, EP, Writer Connor Hines, Alex DiGerlando, and Rudy Mance.

metas.name: Killer on the Run
metas.description: True-crime series focusing on the hunt for elusive killers.

metas.name: The Antiques Riviera
metas.description: Welcome to Devon's antiques heartland, where Britain's most passionate auctioneers, dealers and collectors turn history into hard cash. Every antique tells a story, and every story has a price...

metas.name: Soul Power: The Legend of the American Basketball Association
metas.description: Experience the ABA's nine-year rivalry with the NBA that changed basketball forever. From the 3-point shot to the Slam Dunk Contest, the ABA's innovations became game staples. Told by "Dr. J" Erving, Larry Brown, Bob Costas & other Hall of Famers.

metas.name: How to Get to Heaven from Belfast
metas.description: Three lifelong pals embark on a chaotic quest to solve the mystery of their old friend's suspicious death and keep their own dark secret under wraps.

metas.name: Love Story
metas.description: An anthology of sweeping true love stories that captured the world’s attention.

metas.name: Wasteman
metas.description: Taylor's hopes for a fresh start post-parole are jeopardised by cellmate Dee's arrival. As Dee takes Taylor under his wing, a vicious attack tests their bond, forcing Taylor to choose between protecting Dee and his own chances at freedom.

metas.name: NFL Draft Daily
metas.description: A daily draft-focused show covering prospects, mock drafts, and analysis.

metas.name: The Golden Pear Affair
metas.description: Follows a romantic adventure centered on a mystery involving an international jewelry heist and a missing sister.

metas.name: Inside the CIA: Secrets & Spies
metas.description: A collection of unbelievable, untold, and world-changing stories that reveal what it takes to be a spy beyond the red line of danger.

metas.name: Origin: The Story of the Basketball Africa League
metas.description: Documents the creation and launch of the NBA's first collaboration to operate a league outside North America, a pan-African professional basketball league in partnership with FIBA featuring 12 top club teams from across Africa's 54 countries competing in a caravan format.

metas.name: The Scream Murder: A True Teen Horror Story
metas.description: When high school student Cassie Stoddart is found stabbed to death in a house on the outskirts of Pocatello, Idaho, the community is gripped by fear that a random killer is on the loose. Police retrace Cassie's final hours and focus on three classmates that were the last people to see her alive. As the investigation narrows, detectives uncover a shocking buried video tape that reframes the case, raising the unthinkable question of whether 16-year-olds could have committed such a brutal crime.

metas.name: Katt Williams: The Last Report
metas.description: Back for his fourth Netflix stand-up special, comedy icon Katt Williams delivers his famously bold takes on conspiracies, celebrities and the world at large in this electrifying set.

metas.name: The Summit
metas.description: Twists, turns & treacherous terrain - 14 strangers take on the mountain, competing in a test of resilience & strategy. Can teamwork prevail or will £200k tempt betrayal?

metas.name: The Way to You
metas.description: New Yorkers Emma and Conrad agree to help each other find their missed connections after a subway blackout. Their search might lead to love, but not where either of them expects to find it.

metas.name: F Valentine's Day
metas.description: Gina hates her Valentine's Day birthday and travels to Greece to prevent her boyfriend's proposal. With help from vacationers Johnny and his sister Mickey, she schemes to delay it – while questioning her relationship.

metas.name: GOAT
metas.description: A small goat with big dreams gets a once-in-a-lifetime shot to join the pros and play roarball, a high-intensity, co-ed, full-contact sport dominated by the fastest, fiercest animals in the world.

metas.name: Yoh! Bestie
metas.description: Thando is perpetually unlucky in love, but when her bestie returns from his travels with a fiancée in tow, she's forced to face a new emotion — jealousy.

metas.name: Solo Mio
metas.description: After Matt's dreams of a picturesque Italian wedding are shattered when his fiancée leaves him at the altar, he embarks on his planned honeymoon across Italy alone, immersing himself in the country's vibrant culture, food, and beauty, meeting Gia along the way.

metas.name: The Investigation of Lucy Letby
metas.description: An engaging and thought-provoking look at Lucy Letby, the former nurse serving life in prison after being convicted of the murders of seven infants and the attempted murders of seven others.

metas.name: Relationship Goals
metas.description: When TV producer Leah Caldwell aims to become the first woman running New York's top morning show, her ex competes for the same role. Leah stays focused on her career, until chemistry with her ex challenges her priorities.

metas.name: The Muppet Show
metas.description: Music, comedy, and a whole lot of chaos is bound to ensue when The Muppets once again take the stage of the original Muppet Theatre with their very special guest, Sabrina Carpenter!

metas.name: The Dresden Sun
metas.description: A brilliant, principled mercenary with a traumatic past works with an insider to steal a valued asset from Peredor Corporation called “the sphere”. The C & Earth corporation, vying for global dominance, seeks to find a solution to an otherworldly technology via a scientist’s project. Meanwhile, a financial analyst, who despises his job at the powerful investment firm Mutual One, finds himself caught between deadly corporate rivals, financial fraud, and technological espionage, and is ultimately forced to run from a psychopathic military contractor.

metas.name: Missing the Boat
metas.description: Strangers Kelly and Parker both end up on the same Italian cruise, but after missing the boat during a stop, they're forced to team up and race across southern Italy to catch up.

metas.name: Miracle: The Boys of '80
metas.description: This is the story of the “Miracle on Ice,” when the 1980 US Hockey Team beat the USSR in the Olympic semi-finals at the height of the Cold War to bring home a gold medal. Their iconic underdog story is told with never-before-seen 16mm footage and firsthand reflections from the players who were brought back to the scene of their historic victory.

metas.name: Shelter
metas.description: A man living in self-imposed exile on a remote island rescues a young girl from a violent storm, setting off a chain of events that forces him out of seclusion to protect her from enemies tied to his past.

metas.name: Melania
metas.description: Offering unprecedented access to the 20 days leading up to the 2025 Presidential Inauguration — through the eyes of the First Lady-elect herself — step inside Melania Trump's world as she orchestrates inauguration plans, navigates the complexities of the White House transition, and reenters public life with her family. With exclusive footage capturing critical meetings, private conversations, and never-before-seen environments, Mrs. Trump returns to one of the world's most powerful roles.

metas.name: "Wuthering Heights"
metas.description: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

metas.name: The Wrecking Crew
metas.description: Estranged half-brothers Jonny and James reunite after their father's mysterious death. As they search for the truth, buried secrets reveal a conspiracy threatening to tear their family apart.

metas.name: The AI Doc: Or How I Became an Apocaloptimist
metas.description: A father-to-be tries to figure out what is happening with all this AI insanity, and explores the most powerful technology humanity has ever created... and what's at stake if we get it wrong.

metas.name: Blackout
metas.description: After a nuclear strike devastates California, a group of veterans and criminals trapped in a warehouse must fight to survive marauders, radiation, and each other in a world where the line between good and evil is gone.

metas.name: Queen of Chess
metas.description: A Hungarian girl dreams of conquering international men’s chess. After a 15-year battle against world champion Garry Kasparov and her domineering father, Judit Polgár revolutionizes the sport’s patriarchal culture to become one of the greatest chess prodigies in history and the greatest woman chess player of all time.

metas.name: In the Blink of an Eye
metas.description: Three storylines, spanning thousands of years, intersect and reflect on hope, connection, and the circle of life.

metas.name: Caught by Love
metas.description: While on a journey of self-discovery, a resort guest gets swept into an undercover investigation for stolen jewels that turns into an unexpected and adventurous romance.

metas.name: The Moment
metas.description: A rising pop sensation navigates fame and industry pressures while preparing for her arena tour debut, revealing the transformation of underground culture into mainstream success.

metas.name: Speed Faster
metas.description: Ace and his crew of elite street racers are forced into a high-stakes mission when a shadowy organization threatens someone close to him. In the aftermath of Four Amigos, they find themselves working for the infamous Church of Assassins, tasked with pulling off an impossible job. But as they push their limits, they uncover a chilling truth-failure was always part of the plan. Betrayal, speed, and survival collide in this adrenaline-fueled thriller where the real race isn't just for victory, but for their lives.

metas.name: Skyscraper Live
metas.description: No ropes. No fear. Free solo legend Alex Honnold risks it all in a high-stakes, live ascent of one of the world's tallest skyscrapers in Taipei, Taiwan.

metas.name: Clika
metas.description: Aspiring small-town musician Chito is determined to make it big. When a clip of him performing one of his songs goes viral, he seizes the opportunity and pushes to carve out a place for himself in the new wave of Mexican-American music... and ultimately gets caught in a game more dangerous than anticipated.

metas.name: Mercy
metas.description: In the near future, a detective stands on trial accused of murdering his wife. He has ninety minutes to prove his innocence to the advanced AI Judge he once championed, before it determines his fate.

metas.name: Disneyland Handcrafted
metas.description: Oscar and Emmy nominated filmmaker Leslie Iwerks returns with an all-new Disney documentary giving viewers an up-close look at the dedication, effort, and passion that was required to realize a dream that would go on to inspire millions around the world.

metas.name: Kidnapped: Elizabeth Smart
metas.description: Elizabeth Smart's harrowing abduction at 14 from her family's Utah home unfolds through her own words and never-before-seen material in this documentary.

metas.name: Love on the Amazon
metas.description: Claire travels to Brazil and hires Danny, a riverboat captain, to help her deliver an important message for her sister Amelia, a marine biologist studying pink dolphins on the Amazon River.

metas.name: The Internship
metas.description: A CIA-trained assassin recruits other graduates from her secret childhood program, The Internship, to violently destroy the organization. The CIA fights back with deadly force.

metas.name: The Rip
metas.description: Trust frays when a team of Miami cops discovers millions in cash inside a run-down stash house, calling everyone — and everything — into question.

metas.name: One Last Adventure: The Making of Stranger Things 5
metas.description: An inside look at the years of effort and craft that went into the final installment of the Duffer Brothers' generation-defining series.

metas.name: A Melbourne Match
metas.description: Georgie, a travel writer, travels to Melbourne for an assignment where she meets Zach, an ex-Australian footballer who agrees to be her tour guide and shows her that there's more to life than work.

metas.name: Fuze
metas.description: An unexploded WWII bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation against a ticking clock.

metas.name: Oscar Shaw
metas.description: After retiring from the police force, a relentless detective haunted by the tragic loss of his closest friend sets out on a perilous quest for vengeance, seeking redemption and fighting to restore justice to the streets he once swore to protect.

metas.name: Greenland 2: Migration
metas.description: Having found the safety of the Greenland bunker after the comet Clarke decimated the Earth, the Garrity family must now risk everything to embark on a perilous journey across the wasteland of Europe to find a new home.

metas.name: EPiC: Elvis Presley in Concert
metas.description: Long-lost footage from Elvis Presley's legendary Las Vegas residency in the 1970s woven together with rare 16mm footage from Elvis on Tour, and 8mm from the Graceland archive, plus recordings of Elvis telling "his side of the story" rediscovered during Baz Luhrmann's research for his 2022 film, Elvis.

metas.name: Marcello Hernández: American Boy
metas.description: Filmed in Miami, Hernández's special features his comedic take on his first-generation American upbringing before a local audience.

metas.name: People We Meet on Vacation
metas.description: Poppy's a free spirit. Alex loves a plan. After years of summer vacations, these polar-opposite pals wonder if they could be a perfect romantic match.

metas.name: Lost in Paradise
metas.description: When the founder of a high-end fashion company gets marooned on a "deserted" island with a chef, romance blossoms as they work together to survive.

metas.name: Cheetahs Up Close with Bertie Gregory
metas.description: Bertie arrives in the Serengeti as the spectacular wildebeest migration kicks off. He’s here to film the fastest land animal on Earth: the cheetah. As he gets close to a mother caring for her tiny cubs and a young group of males executing phenomenal hunts as a team, he learns about the unexpected challenges the species endures.

metas.name: Evil Influencer: The Jodi Hildebrandt Story
metas.description: Unravel the case of Utah therapist Jodi Hildebrandt, whose child abuse arrest with parenting YouTuber Ruby Franke exposed a twisted tale of manipulation.

metas.name: Ricky Gervais: Mortality
metas.description: Ricky Gervais tackles life, death and the state of the world in a brutally honest special that spares no topic, even his own mortality.

metas.name: Critical Incident: Death at the Border
metas.description: Revisits the 2010 death of Anastasio Hernández-Rojas, an undocumented Mexican immigrant who died while in custody at the border. When eye-witness video emerges, it sparks a far-reaching investigation from a border checkpoint to Washington D.C. CRITICAL INCIDENT chronicles journalists’, lawyers’, and family members’ efforts to explore the Border Patrol’s involvement in the incident, ultimately pointing to cover-ups, and uncovering the existence of a little-known unit inside the agency that had been involved in other border related incident.

metas.name: Tom Segura: Teacher
metas.description: Parenting fails. Blackout bar stories. Career regrets. Tom Segura explores the darkly funny side of life's most unpredictable lessons.

metas.name: Elway
metas.description: Told in his own words, the definitive story of Denver Broncos quarterback John Elway goes deep on his NFL dreams, heartbreaks and Super Bowl redemption.

metas.name: The Christmas Baby
metas.description: When a baby boy shows up on their doorstep days before Christmas with a note written specially for them, Erin and Kelly must learn how to navigate their new relationship and career dynamics while unexpectedly caring for a newborn.

metas.name: A Make or Break Holiday
metas.description: Despite recently going on a break, couple Liv and Daniel had planned to host their families together for Christmas. So, they decide to keep their original plans and pretend to still be together for the holidays.

metas.name: Dave Chappelle: The Unstoppable...
metas.description: Facing a world gone sideways, comedy icon Dave Chappelle delivers bold truths and potent punchlines in this no-holds-barred special.

metas.name: Kumail Nanjiani: Night Thoughts
metas.description: After nearly a decade away, Kumail Nanjiani returns to Chicago, where he got his start in standup, in a new special that tackles anxiety, the perils of buying drugs pre-legalization, and most importantly, cat medication.

metas.name: Adult Swim's The Elephant
metas.description: Crafted in three parts by four animation superstars, Adult Swim's The Elephant brings to life a very human journey of self-discovery in varied styles.

metas.name: Breakdown: 1975
metas.description: In 1975, as America faced social and political upheaval, filmmakers turned chaos into art.

metas.name: Murder in Monaco
metas.description: Monaco, 1999. One of the world's richest men dies in his penthouse. This documentary unpacks the mysterious murder of billionaire banker, Edmond Safra.

metas.name: Robby Hoffman: Wake Up
metas.description: Breakout star Robby Hoffman hilariously pushes the limits of comedy with red-hot, controversial takes in her debut special.

metas.name: A Royal Christmas Tail
metas.description: When a dashing prince trades a glass slipper for a dog tag, he embarks on a heartwarming Christmas quest to find the mysterious woman — and her adorable pup — who captured his heart in one magical holiday moment.

metas.name: A Suite Holiday Romance
metas.description: During Christmas week, Sabrina jumps at the opportunity to ghostwrite a memoir for a famous art dealer at the iconic Grand Fairbanks Hotel in New York City. The week gets complicated when she meets a handsome British visitor at the hotel bar; she thinks he’s a member of the British aristocracy, and he thinks she’s a wealthy hotel guest.

metas.name: Sarah Squirm: Live + in the Flesh
metas.description: After four seasons (and counting) on Saturday Night Live, Sarah Sherman's unholy alter ego, Sarah Squirm, slithers onto your screen and rips off the straitjacket, unleashing a festering and hilarious hour of bodily fluids, open-wound confessionals, and jokes that will leave scars on your soul.

metas.name: Goodbye June
metas.description: Four siblings' lives change drastically when their ailing mother takes a turn for the worse over the holiday season.

metas.name: Taylor Swift | The Eras Tour | The Final Show
metas.description: Filmed at the end of the tour in Vancouver, B.C., with the entire Tortured Poets Department set.

metas.name: Turbulence
metas.description: Young married couple Zach and Emmy decide to take a hot air balloon trip across the Italian Dolomites to rekindle their relationship. When they and pilot Harry are joined by a third passenger, Julia, events unfold in ways they could never imagine five thousand meters in the air.

metas.name: Merv
metas.description: When their beloved dog Merv loses his spark after their split, Anna and Russ are forced into the world's most awkward co-parenting arrangement. Hoping to shake Merv out of his funk, Russ takes him to Florida for a much-needed getaway-only for Anna to show up unexpectedly. As Merv slowly gets his groove back, turns out fixing their dog's broken heart may lead to a few sparks of their own.

metas.name: Ella McCay
metas.description: An idealistic young politician juggles familial issues and a challenging work life while preparing to take over the job of her mentor, the state’s longtime incumbent governor.

metas.name: Kevin Costner Presents: The First Christmas
metas.description: Kevin Costner hosts this special exploring the extraordinary journey of Mary and Joseph as they navigate the hardships, trials and triumphs surrounding Jesus Christ's birth, offering an inspiring way to experience the true meaning of Christmas.

metas.name: Masaka Kids, A Rhythm Within
metas.description: The story behind the Uganda-based YouTube dance sensations who have endured devastating personal loss from famine and war, and use the power of dance and song to overcome hardship.

metas.name: David
metas.description: From the songs of his mother’s heart to the whispers of a faithful God, David’s story begins in quiet devotion. When the giant Goliath rises to terrorize a nation, a young shepherd armed with only a sling, a few stones, and unshakable faith steps forward. Pursued by power and driven by purpose, his journey tests the limits of loyalty, love, and courage—culminating in a battle not just for a crown, but for the soul of a kingdom.

metas.name: Elmo and Mark Rober's Merry Giftmas
metas.description: Elmo and his Sesame Street friends work with former NASA engineer turned YouTube star Mark Rober to make special presents for a Merry Giftmas exchange.

metas.name: Single on the 25th
metas.description: After Nell’s family cancels holiday plans at the last minute, she decides to spend the week of Christmas having fun on her own — and crosses paths with her neighbor, who is “happily unattached.”

metas.name: She's Making a List
metas.description: Naughty or Nice inspector Isabel Haynes doesn’t anticipate anything out of the ordinary when she’s assigned to evaluate 11-year-old Charlie Duncan. However, soon, Isabel falls for Charlie’s widowed father Jason, which makes her question the rigid rules of her job. As Christmas approaches, Isabel must choose between following the holiday algorithm or following her heart.

metas.name: Pose
metas.description: Isolated in a grand country manor, a reclusive artist spends a passionate and paranoid weekend with his ex-lover, an obsessive fan, and a potential muse. Hoping to spark a new wave of artistic brilliance over the course of a few tumultuous days, filled with chaos and revelation not all of them will make it out alive.

metas.name: Pandora: Fire and Ice
metas.description: Decades after humanity's first contact with Pandora, a new expedition returns to harvest what's left of the planet's resources-only to discover that the alien species is preparing to strike back against Earth.

metas.name: Love and Wine
metas.description: A privileged young man working at his wealthy father's business traps himself in a lie when he falls in love with a hard-working medical student, and tries to convince her that he comes from more humble beginnings like hers. What follows is a comedic whirlwind of chaos and heartfelt revelations.

metas.name: Prompt
metas.description: When a young woman begins immersing herself in the arena of AI, her wildest and darkest fantasies become sensual realities. But the deeper she sinks into her online explorations, the closer she gets to the shocking truth.

metas.name: Speed Train
metas.description: When a futuristic train journey turns chaotic due to a tech genius's malevolent hacking of brain-implanted passengers, a group of disparate travelers must band together to regain control, confronting not only immediate dangers but also the darker implications of unchecked technology.

metas.name: Frontier Crucible
metas.description: In 1870s Arizona Territory, a desperately needed wagon full of medical supplies falls victim to an Apache attack. The only man who can guide it through is Merrick Beckford, but in order to get there, he’ll need to enlist the help of a trio of dangerous outlaws hellbent on survival. When they accidentally kill an Apache scout, all bets are off, and survival is the name of the game.

metas.name: 100 Nights of Hero
metas.description: When a charming house guest arrives at a remote castle, the delicate dynamic between a neglectful husband, his innocent bride Cherry and their devoted maid Hero is thrown into chaos.

metas.name: Fackham Hall
metas.description: A new servant embarks on an unlikely relationship with the youngest daughter of a prominent English family. Simultaneously, rivalries are spilling over in the Davenport family, led by the Lord and Lady as they also weather the epic failure of the wedding of their eldest daughter to her caddish cousin.

metas.name: The Making of Jay Kelly
metas.description: From the immersive opening shot to the emotional final line, go behind the scenes with director Noah Baumbach, George Clooney, Adam Sandler and more.

metas.name: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Last Straw
metas.description: When laidback Greg finds himself at odds with his dad's outsized expectations, pressure builds to turn his act around. After a series of hilarious near disasters, Greg's dad presents him with an ultimatum that just might challenge his wimpy ways for good.

metas.name: I'm Chevy Chase and You're Not
metas.description: From his Saturday Night Live beginnings to a string of classic comedies, Chevy Chase has always had huge comedic range. He is also a complex and contradictory human being. Featuring revealing interviews with those closest to him, this documentary digs into the talent, flaws, and humanity that shaped an icon.

metas.name: The First Snow of Fraggle Rock
metas.description: When the holidays are filled with unexpected adventures and challenges, the Fraggles learn to appreciate each day for being unique and special, like a snowflake.

metas.name: Hunting Season
metas.description: When a reclusive survivalist and his daughter rescue a mysterious, wounded woman from a river, they become entangled in a deadly web of violence and revenge, forcing them to confront a brutal criminal to survive.

metas.name: Oh. What. Fun.
metas.description: Claire Clauster is the glue that holds her chaotic, lovable family together at the holidays. But this year, after planning a special outing for them, they make a crucial mistake and leave her home alone. Fed up and feeling under appreciated, she sets off on an impromptu adventure of her own. As her family scrambles to find her, Claire discovers the unexpected magic of a Christmas gone off-script.

metas.name: With Love, Meghan: Holiday Celebration
metas.description: 'Tis the season! Meghan shares her favorite holiday traditions, seasonal crafts and family recipes with friends old and new in this festive special.

metas.name: My Secret Santa
metas.description: A single mom needs a job. A ski resort needs a Santa. Disguised as a St. Nick lookalike, can Taylor fool a charming hotel heir into ho-ho-hiring her?

metas.name: The Housemaid
metas.description: Trying to escape her past, Millie Calloway accepts a job as a live-in housemaid for the wealthy Nina and Andrew Winchester. But what begins as a dream job quickly unravels into something far more dangerous—a sexy, seductive game of secrets, scandal, and power.

metas.name: Matt Rife: Unwrapped - A Christmas Crowd Work Special
metas.description: From gifts gone wrong to family tradition fails, Matt Rife turns an unpredictable audience into an unscripted holiday special.

metas.name: Avatar: Fire and Ash
